title: chore: own generation secrets under gen.pollinations.ai
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Keys to the Hive
gist.blurb: We've reorganized how API keys and secrets are stored under the hood, making our deployment pipeline cleaner and more secure.
gist.summary: Consolidated generation secrets into environment-specific files under gen.pollinations.ai, removing complex merge logic and updating rotation scripts.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup simplifies our deployment process and makes secret rotation more reliable.
gist.visual_concept: The bee organizing glowing keys or locked boxes in a cozy garden shed, representing the reorganization of secrets and environment variables.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, organizing glowing golden keys into neat wooden boxes inside a cozy garden shed. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, organizing glowing golden keys into neat wooden boxes inside a cozy garden shed.
